title: Morning Calm — Gentle Tapping to Start the Day
description: A soft 10-minute EFT sequence to release overnight tension and set a kind tone for the day. Tap along with Jessica through each point.

title: Releasing Anxiety — Tapping for a Racing Mind
description: When your thoughts won't slow down, this guided round helps you come back to your body and your breath.

title: Self-Worth — Tapping to Feel Enough
description: A tender session for softening self-criticism and welcoming a kinder inner voice.

title: Evening Unwind — Tapping Before Sleep
description: Let the day go. A calming EFT round to quiet the nervous system and prepare for rest.
